name: Divine Corn Chowder
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Red bell pepper, finely diced
1/4 cup Green bell pepper, finely diced
1 cup Whole-kernel corn, fresh or frozen
1 tsp Thyme, chopped (or 1/2 tsp dried thyme)
Chopped parsley or scallions for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large saucepan.
2. Saute the onion, bell pepper, and garlic for about 5 minutes.
3. Add half of the corn and cook for another 5 minutes.
4. Stir in salt, cumin, white pepper, thyme, curry powder, and soup base.
5. Steam or boil the remaining corn until it is soft and sweet to taste (about 5-10 minutes).
6. Drain the corn if necessary, reserving any liquid.
7. Add enough water to make up 1 cup of liquid.
8. Blend the corn with the liquid and stir into the sauteed vegetables.
9. Heat through and serve, garnished with chopped parsley or scallions.
